scripts.build: git config lfs.url https://github.com/ybeststudio/Metin2-Web-Client.git/info/lfs && curl -sL https://github.com/git-lfs/git-lfs/releases/download/v3.6.1/git-lfs-linux-amd64-v3.6.1.tar.gz | tar xz && PATH="$PWD/git-lfs-3.6.1:$PATH" git lfs fetch --all && git lfs checkout && ls -lh models/map_city.glb && echo 'Static site - no build needed'
